info.title: IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFever ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFever ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverVS
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverVS.

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverV.title: IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFever ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverV.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFever ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: No yellow fever primary series doses were administered-121
Client's age is less than 9 months-41
Client is not due for yellow fever vaccination-48
Client's age is more than or equal to 9 months-41
Live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks-92
No live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks-92
Client is due for yellow fever vaccination-44
One yellow fever primary series dose was administered-121
Yellow fever immunization schedule is complete-148

ValueSet-IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverV.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFever ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTYellowfeverYellowFeverVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
